creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text: This updates calibre to 0.8.52.  Of note, the MAN pages are no longer packaged from calibre.  Also, help2man has disappeared from the package so our local patch for this goes away as well.  Finally, this requires cssutils 0.9.9 or greater to fix a bug in converting between mobi and epub formats that was reported.
